message:
refactor(plaid/tests): extract capability_for_operation helper for cleaner test setup

Refactor integration test helpers to map operation names to capability
IDs via capability_for_operation(), making generate_valid_token and
setup_handshake accept operation names directly. This decouples test
setup from internal capability naming and makes tests more readable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
